description_long: This house features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a flat roof, characterized by large vertical windows on the front and side facades. The front includes a prominent garage door and a set of double glass doors, suggesting a main entryway. The structure is divided into multiple rooms, visible from the open roof, with interior wooden doors providing access between spaces. The exterior is predominantly white, with extensive use of glass for natural lighting. The rear and side elevations have fewer windows, maintaining privacy while still allowing light. The overall appearance is minimalist, with a focus on geometric forms and functional layout.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large vertical windows, a garage, and a minimalist white exterior.
description_view_0: Front view showing large vertical windows, a double glass entry door, and a wide garage door.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting plain white walls and several interior wooden doors visible through the open roof.
description_view_2: Side view with vertical strip windows and a mostly solid white wall, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with minimal windows and a glimpse of the interior layout through the open roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: vertical strips, large front-facing windows, asymmetrical placement
attribute_entryway_design: Double glass doors with no porch or overhang, adjacent to a wide garage door, minimal decorative elements
